name: Sprint 6

dates.duration_note: Opened 2026-06-10 by Team Lead directive. EXEC-065 (update false-positive-drift fix) pulled grill-skipping as a bug fix; the rest of sprint-6 scope (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks) awaits the upcoming Work Grill before issues are filed and pulled.

goal: Ship the update false-positive-drift fix (EXEC-065) and the sprint-6 scope set by the upcoming Work Grill (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks).

shipped.title: EXEC-065: Scaffolder update stops false-positive drift when a file matches the incoming template
shipped.summary: update() now tests currentHash === templateHash before the recorded-hash drift check, so a file byte-identical to the incoming template is classified unchanged and re-anchored to the template hash regardless of a stale recorded hash. Genuine drift still reported and left in place with its old anchor; clean-upgrade refresh path unchanged. Verified in a temp-dir test (all 6 checks) and a dogfood-root update re-run reporting drifted 0 (~8 prior false-positives now unchanged).
shipped.notes: Commit 93f1489 (src/bin/cli.js only). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS (step_log). Grill-skipping local bug fix pulled by Team Lead directive 2026-06-10. Dogfood-root marker re-anchor (8 stale anchors + 0.3.0->0.4.0) demonstrated but not committed — a live update also pulled in viewer's uncommitted src/template/viewer WIP, so builder reverted that side-effect; the code fix alone already makes those files report unchanged, so nothing is functionally pending.

shipped.title: EXEC-066: Template ships .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/; stamp policy classes both work-tracking
shipped.summary: The Template ships the two ADR-0008 record homes on every fresh init via empty .gitkeep (adr/-style): .excn/progress/ (agent/gate-written) and .excn/runtime/ (hook-written). stamp-policy adds both prefixes to WORK_TRACKING_DIR_PREFIXES, so update classes them work-tracking and never touches records inside; the .gitkeep stamps without entering the version marker. .excn/.gitignore (*_progress.json) covers both homes at any depth — no gitignore edit. Verified end-to-end in a temp dir (11 checks).
shipped.notes: Commit 7e4a7d8 (5 files: src/bin/stamp-policy.js + src/template/.excn/{progress,runtime}/.gitkeep + dogfood-root mirror). Gates: code-standards PASS + package-qa PASS (step_log). PRD-009 slice 1 (dependency root). depends_on: none.

shipped.title: EXEC-071: viewer sprint switcher — past sprints readable from the status page
shipped.summary: Viewer keeps every probed sprint and adds a header switcher (newest first, active default); a closed sprint renders the same lanes plus its decisions, retrospective notes, and step_log verdicts. Selection round-trips through the History API (pushState/popstate, ?sprint=N deep-link). No server change; read-only over the .excn JSON. Src-First + dogfood mirror; verified on the live viewer server.
shipped.notes: Commit bc8e892 (8 viewer files). Gate: code-standards PASS (step_log). PRD-009 slice 6; shipped ahead of S6-3..S6-6 (no deps). depends_on: none.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-067: hooks, doctor, viewer-server read and write Runtime Records under .excn/runtime/
not_shipped.summary: Hook-written state becomes Runtime Records: invocation heartbeat ledger, viewer-server pid record, gate-watch state all move to .excn/runtime/. doctor heartbeat checks and the viewer-server daemon read the new home; no hook writes any *_progress.json at the .excn base. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-068: Verdict Ledger schema — gates' append shape validates strictly
not_shipped.summary: New verdict-ledger.schema.json defines the append-only array of gate verdicts (step, at, artifact, summary). The session Verdict Ledger and a sprint record's step_log share the entry shape; sprint.schema.json references it rather than duplicating. progress.schema.json unchanged for trackers. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-069: migrate command relocates Progress/Runtime Records; doctor flags the legacy flat layout
not_shipped.summary: New Scaffolder migrate command relocates known records on an already-stamped Instance into their ADR-0008 homes: versioned migration table, idempotent re-run, location-only (byte-identical), every move reported. doctor detects the legacy flat layout and names migrate. update's never-touch-work-tracking contract unchanged. package-qa rubric extended (chartered, alignment-gated per ADR-0004). Dogfood root migrated as proof. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-070: progress-location deny guard — misfiled Progress Record writes denied with a redirect
not_shipped.summary: PreToolUse guard in the spawn-guard pattern denies a *_progress.json write outside .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/, redirect reason naming the right home. Rules/decision split, hooks.config toggle, every firing invocation-logged, fail-safe on any error. Location only — schema and content stay the gates' job. Src-First.

not_shipped.title: EXEC-072: viewer hook health — doctor-parity cards plus the invocation log
not_shipped.summary: The viewer renders per-feature hook health cards mirroring doctor (firing / stale / disabled, last heartbeat) from the Runtime Record invocation ledger, with a collapsible recent-invocations table filterable by feature and outcome. Missing/empty ledger renders an explicit empty state. Src-First, verified on the live viewer server.

step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. ADR-0008 and CONTEXT.md grill-time additions conform to all Principles and project Philosophy.
PASS — 0 violations. Digest filename convention change (<prd-id> → <prd-id>-<prd-slug>) conforms to all Principles and project Philosophy; tied to a real retro observation.
PASS — 0 violations. Reordering, comment, and docstring changes conform to all Structure and Commenting rules.

step_log.artifact: EXEC-065 — Scaffolder update() false-positive drift fix in src/bin/cli.js
step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. All stamp-contract checks hold: manifest exact (46 files, gitignore rename correct), idempotency (0 writes on second init), all JSON parses, .excn/.gitignore contains exactly *_progress.json with no root .gitignore created, pack parity (un-dotted gitignore ships in tarball, no dotted form), skip-safety (pre-existing file preserved), pointer wiring (all 7 sub-cases pass including oversized AGENTS.md warning). EXEC-065 fix verified: a file byte-identical to the template but carrying a stale recorded hash is classified unchanged and re-anchored to the template hash, not reported as drifted.

step_log.artifact: EXEC-066 — src/bin/stamp-policy.js (two WORK_TRACKING_DIR_PREFIXES entries) + four .gitkeep files
step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. New entries land in the data module under a named constant with a why-not-what comment citing ADR-0008; .gitkeep files are empty; all Structure and Commenting rules hold.
FAIL — 1 violation. No dead code: ELEMENT_IDS.footerNote declared in viewer.js but never accessed anywhere in the script.
PASS — 0 violations. Dead footerNote key removed from ELEMENT_IDS; all Structure and Commenting rules hold on the revised change.

step_log.artifact: EXEC-066 — Template ships .excn/progress/ and .excn/runtime/ with .gitkeep; stamp-policy adds both to WORK_TRACKING_DIR_PREFIXES
step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. All stamp-contract checks hold: manifest exact (48 files, progress/.gitkeep and runtime/.gitkeep present, gitignore rename correct), idempotency (0 writes on second init, 48 skipped), all JSON parses, .excn/.gitignore contains exactly *_progress.json (16 bytes, no root .gitignore created), pack parity (both .gitkeep files ship in tarball as 0B entries, un-dotted gitignore ships, no dotted form), skip-safety (pre-existing file preserved), pointer wiring (all 7 sub-cases pass including oversized AGENTS.md warning). EXEC-066 specifics: progress/.gitkeep and runtime/.gitkeep stamped on init; neither appears in framework-version.json files map (work-tracking, not invariant); a *_progress.json placed in each home survives update byte-identical and is not listed in refreshed/drifted output; .excn/.gitignore unchanged at *_progress.json.

retrospective_notes.title: Sprint-6 scope is grill-pending; EXEC-065 pulled ahead of it
retrospective_notes.body: The Work Grill for the rest of sprint-6 scope (viewer improvements, progress-file organization/naming, guard hooks) has not run yet. EXEC-065 is a grill-skipping bug fix pulled into sprint 6 by Team Lead directive on 2026-06-10; the remaining scope is filed and pulled only after the grill runs.

retrospective_notes.title: npm 0.3.0 lagged HEAD at the same version number (PRD-009 grill)
retrospective_notes.body: The published npm 0.3.0 lagged HEAD while carrying the same version number — template content changed without a version bump, so consumers on 0.3.0 silently missed it. Candidate: a preflight guard forcing a version bump when template content changes. Philosophy/process candidate carried for the Retro Loop.
